text: “Funeral procession” means a procession of two or more vehicles accompanying a vehicle containing the body of a deceased person.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.090 — “Funeral procession” defined.

“Funeral procession” means a procession of two or more vehicles accompanying a vehicle containing the body of a deceased person.

subsections.text: “Funeral procession” means a procession of two or more vehicles accompanying a vehicle containing the body of a deceased person.
